itemListElement.reviewBody: VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY VERY BADDDDD SCHOOLLLLL!!!! TOTALLY NOT RECOMMENDED

The most worst school I hadn't seen ever than this 
I want to take some names of teachers and students who makes this school worst 
Teachers :-
Swati Ray, Kakuli Nag, Amita Kapoor and the ruler of them from the last 20 years that the only principal Mr.Shivastava
Students :- 
The only and one Tanisha Agarwal more are there but no I am board and now I am not going to explore more
THE POOR SCHOOL
I'll request you to do not get admission of your child in this school otherwise your child image will also fall do as the image of this school 🙏
Thank you,
From- A black hole 
To- The Victims who are coming in trap of this school...

Very bad experience ... students suffer from depression with such pressure .. teachers are incompetent in secondary section. Specially the maths teacher . They give all difficult sums as homework and doesn't even explain it the next day .. teachers give loads of homework.. a student cannot follow her passion if she gets into this school ..
The teachers are very rude .

St agnes will be a better alternative.....I am sharing my personal experience here I have faced Bodyshaming (not as a concern for my health but as an insult) from younger teachers...... Made me suffer from inferiority complex as a teenager so much that I still couldn't forget the incident.....I have studied in this school right from class 4-12 but never could bring myself to like this school....I would like to add if you are unlucky enough you will have Mrs Sumita Dhar as your class teacher..... She legit went to that extent where she told my father I am so indifferent I need a special school for myself if you know what that means....And because I was a shy kid her words were always like "she doesn't talk much but she is very cunning" like why lady? You have a son who is of my age probably older have some empathy you are a teacher!!

This school is not caring about their maintenance. Primery section toilet are very dirty it was not cleand.Little girls are facing problems due to unhygienic circumstances. In class room fans are not working properly and no.of fans are less compared to class strength. In each class 65 student with one teacher then how could they  pay attention on our child .There is a limit of students in a class about 40-45 should be in each section so that they get proper attention of teacher and can share their doubt to teacher easily .Here teacher become irritable to seeing to much student in class and they always scold and become angry on girls and they always say "go and sit on your place when girl want to share their  doubt, and problems without knowing anything  teachers scold on child.
Student  will fill with fear that if we ask something to ma'am  " mujhe ma'am dant dengi."
If this is known as being a disciplined school then fine it  is disciplined school!
Best school for girls not only in Howrah but in whole WB state. Discipline is maintained very accordingly and teachers are good helpers and care takers for the students.

Don’t know about the quality of education but the staff here are highly inadequate. They would blatantly lie and mislead about the admission process and harass the parents. Had really bad experience here. Highly incompetent staff, with zero regards towards parents and students. I had come here for admission purpose and the staffs at the reception blatantly just said that admission won’t happen because they only take admission in nursery. However when I asked them to show the guideline to corroborate the fact they said that we need to take his words as the guideline. This is the most ridiculous statement I’ve ever heard! It is sad to see the state of the school wherein the staffs are highly incompetent, doesn’t have the basic courtesy! Wouldn’t recommend this school to anyone. If I could give negative rating would’ve done that.
